name_en: BV's new Andiamo is in stock!!️ Classic Intrecciato woven craftsmanship creates a soft bag, metal knots are micro-cast aluminum using jewelry craftsmanship 🪢, decorative beads are metal and hand-polished oak, making you switch between elegance and fun 💃, unpredictable. Classic and versatile, looks classy, and the bag has a large capacity, very convenient for daily commuting! Multiple carrying methods, adjustable strap, original sheepskin feels soft and delicate, unisex style, breaking gender boundaries, bringing a more practical and durable experience, combining elegance and casual style, the Andiamo perfectly interprets the look of "fashion old money style".

Model: 743568+Wood Hardware
Color: Nut Color
Dimensions: 25*22*10.5cm
